caption:
Late nights are the only time the campus really wakes up 💫

The fluorescent lights hummed overhead as I adjusted my blazer, feeling the familiar pull of my fitted skirt against my thighs. Professor Elena Vance didn't look like your average academic. She commanded the lecture hall with an electric gaze, her curves accentuated by a skirt that hugged every inch of perfection. Tonight, I was staying late to review some papers.

The door creaked open. She stepped in, heels clicking on the linoleum. Her blouse was unbuttoned just enough to reveal a sliver of skin that made my breath hitch.

"Still here?" Her voice was smooth like velvet.

"Just finishing up," I murmured.

She closed the distance, the air thick with heat. Her perfume, something expensive and spicy, wrapped around me. I watched her chest move as she leaned in.

"Good," she whispered. "Because we have a lot to cover before morning."

#Teacher #UniversityLife #Curves #LateNightStudy #ProfessorVibes #SecretMeetings
